css: .card { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.55; color: #1a1a1a; text-align: left; padding: 18px; background: #fafaf7; } .card.nightMode, .nightMode .card { color: #e8e8e8; background: #1e1e1e; } .front, .back { font-size: 19px; } .back { margin-top: 14px; padding-top: 14px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.18); } .nightMode .back { border-top-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); } strong { color: #0f172a; } .nightMode strong { color: #f1f5f9; } code { font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', Menlo, monospace; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.92em; } .nightMode code { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 10px 0; font-size: 16px; } th { font-size: 13px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px; color: #555; padding: 8px 12px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 2px solid #888; } td { padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .nightMode th { color: #94a3b8; border-bottom-color: #475569; } .nightMode td { border-bottom-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } ul, ol { padding-left: 22px; margin: 6px 0; } li { margin: 4px 0; } .source { margin-top: 18px; padding-top: 8px; border-top: 1px dashed rgba(0,0,0,0.2); font-size: 13px; color: #6b6b6b; font-style: italic; } .nightMode .source { border-top-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); color: #94a3b8; } img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 6px; }
